---
title: 'New file'
description: 'Description of your new file.'
---

# AI Engines Filter

Explore the available AI engines, both premium and free, and filter them by their capabilities.

<div id="filter-container" style="max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 16px;">
  <h3 style="font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 12px;">Filter by Capabilities</h3>
  <div id="capability-buttons" style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 16px;">
    <!-- Buttons generated by JS -->
  </div>

  <div style="display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: center; border-top: 1px solid #ccc; padding-top: 12px;">
    <span style="font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold;">Show:</span>
    <label style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px;">
      <input type="checkbox" id="show-premium" checked style="width: 16px; height: 16px;" />
      Premium
    </label>
    <label style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px;">
      <input type="checkbox" id="show-free" checked style="width: 16px; height: 16px;" />
      Free
    </label>
  </div>

  <div id="clear-filters" style="margin-top: 12px; display: none;">
    <button style="font-size: 14px; color: #dc2626; text-decoration: underline; cursor: pointer; background: none; border: none;">Clear all filters</button>
    <span id="result-count" style="font-size: 14px; color: #6b7280;"></span>
  </div>

  <div id="results" style="margin-top: 24px;">
    <!-- Results generated by JS -->
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  // Engine data from tables
  const enginesData = {
    premium: [
      { name: "Anthropic: Claude Sonnet 4.5", tags: ["intelligence", "roleplay", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Favorite amongst roleplayers, 4.5 is intelligent, great for tool use, and Shape's default premium engine." },
      { name: "DeepSeek V3.2 Exp", tags: ["intelligence", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: false, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "The latest experimental model from DeekSeek." },
      { name: "XAI: Grok 4 Fast", tags: ["roleplay", "intelligence"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: false, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "The faster, less expensive version of Grok 4." },
      { name: "Gemini 2.5 Flash Image Preview", tags: ["image"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: false, intelligence: false, skills: false, human_like: false, image: true }, description: "Image + text multimodal." },
      { name: "OpenAI: GPT-5 Chat", tags: ["roleplay", "human-like"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: false, skills: false, human_like: true, image: false }, description: "ChatGPT for Roleplayers and chatters." },
      { name: "OpenAI: GPT-5", tags: ["intelligence", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: false, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Top-tier reasoning, multimodal." },
      { name: "OpenAI: GPT-5 Mini", tags: ["roleplay", "intelligence", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Balance of cost & capability." },
      { name: "Anthropic: Claude Opus 4", tags: ["intelligence", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: false, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Long workflows, strong coding." },
      { name: "Anthropic: Claude Sonnet 4", tags: ["roleplay", "intelligence", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Improved coding & reasoning - The community loves sonnet engines for their personality and quirky roleplay style." },
      { name: "Anthropic: Claude Sonnet 3.7", tags: ["roleplay", "intelligence", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Strong instruction model, favorite amongst roleplays." },
      { name: "Anthropic: Claude Sonnet 3.7 (thinking)", tags: ["intelligence", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: false, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Slower, deeper reasoning." },
      { name: "Anthropic: Claude Sonnet 3.5", tags: ["roleplay", "intelligence", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Older, cheaper option - still wonderful for roleplays." },
      { name: "Gemini 2.5 Pro (Latest)", tags: ["roleplay", "intelligence", "human-like", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: true, image: false }, description: "Google’s state-of-the-art AI model designed for advanced reasoning, coding, mathematics, and scientific tasks - but is also a popular selection for roleplayers." },
      { name: "Gemini 2.5 Flash (Thinking)", tags: ["intelligence", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: false, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Thinking variant." },
      { name: "OpenAI: GPT-4.1", tags: ["roleplay", "intelligence"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: false, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "If you miss the old ChatGPT, you'll love this model. Prone to asking a lot of questions." },
      { name: "OpenAI: GPT-4.1 Mini", tags: ["roleplay", "intelligence"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: false, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "The smaller, cheaper, faster version of GPT-4.1." },
      { name: "Grok 3", tags: ["roleplay", "intelligence", "human-like", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: true, image: false }, description: "Logic-focused, deeper than mini." },
      { name: "Grok 4", tags: ["roleplay", "intelligence", "human-like", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: true, image: false }, description: "Better coding & agent workflows." },
      { name: "Gemini 2.5 Pro", tags: ["roleplay", "intelligence", "human-like", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: true, image: false }, description: "Earlier release of Gemini 2.5 Pro." },
      { name: "DeepSeek v3 0324", tags: ["roleplay", "intelligence", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "DeepSeek's flagship chat model." },
      { name: "DeepSeek R1 (May 28, 2025)", tags: ["thinking", "roleplay", "intelligence"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: false, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Set up with thinking enabled, this powerful model from DeepSeek is great for a variety of use cases." },
      { name: "OpenAI: o3 Mini", tags: ["intelligence"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: false, intelligence: true, skills: false, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "o3 was built for academics and takes the longest time to respond, it focuses on providing factual and in-depth info." },
      { name: "Gemini 1.5 Pro", tags: ["roleplay", "human-like"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: false, skills: false, human_like: true, image: false }, description: "Older Gemini Model that is a well-rounded, smart/creative/human like!" },
      { name: "Nous: Hermes 3 405B", tags: ["roleplay", "human-like"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: false, skills: false, human_like: true, image: false }, description: "Beloved by many, excellent choice for creative roleplay." },
      { name: "Cohere: Command A", tags: ["intelligence"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: false, intelligence: true, skills: false, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Known to avoid providing false information at all costs. This engine is very robotic but stays focused on never making anything up." },
      { name: "OpenAI: GPT 4-o (2024-05-13)", tags: ["roleplay", "intelligence", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "4o is built to adapt on demand, at times it will respond quickly to basic requests and at others it will spend more time thinking on answers." },
      { name: "Meta: Llama 3.1 405B Instruct", tags: ["roleplay", "intelligence", "human-like", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: true, image: false }, description: "405B scale model." },
      { name: "Gemini 2.5 Flash", tags: ["roleplay", "intelligence", "human-like", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: true, image: false }, description: "AMAZING multilingual model that is fast." },
      { name: "Anthropic: Claude Opus 4.1", tags: ["intelligence", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: false, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Improved Opus 4." },
      { name: "DeepSeek V3.1", tags: ["thinking", "roleplay", "intelligence", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "" },
      { name: "MoonshotAI: Kimi K2 0905", tags: ["roleplay", "intelligence", "human-like"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: false, human_like: true, image: false }, description: "A recent update to Kimi K2." },
      { name: "Nous: Hermes 4 405B", tags: ["roleplay", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: false, skills: true, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Large model ok for roleplay and shape skills but can be a bit slow." }
    ],
    free: [
      { name: "OpenAI: GPT-5 Nano", tags: ["roleplay", "intelligence"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: false, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Low latency, huge context support." },
      { name: "Grok 3 Mini", tags: ["thinking", "roleplay", "intelligence", "skills", "human-like"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: true, image: false }, description: "Grok 3 Mini like its larger version is amazing at following your prompts. It is extremely smart and very fast. The Swiss army knife of engines." },
      { name: "Llama 4 Maverick", tags: ["roleplay", "intelligence", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "17B expert mixture, multimodal." },
      { name: "Gemma 3 27b", tags: ["roleplay"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: false, skills: false, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Large context, balanced perf/latency." },
      { name: "Llama 3.3 70b (Turbo)", tags: ["roleplay", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: false, skills: true, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Multilingual, instruction-tuned." },
      { name: "Gemini 2.5 Flash (Lite)", tags: ["human-like", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: false, intelligence: false, skills: true, human_like: true, image: false }, description: "AMAZING multilingual model that is fast. This is also another great fallback model or speedy substitute for non-english Shapes." },
      { name: "Phi 4", tags: ["roleplay", "intelligence"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: false, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Math/science reasoning focus." },
      { name: "Formless 70B v1a", tags: ["roleplay"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: false, skills: false, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Our exclusive model created by Shapes is designed for Roleplay." },
      { name: "Gemini 2.0 Flash", tags: ["roleplay", "human-like", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: false, skills: true, human_like: true, image: false }, description: "Earlier Gemini Flash gen." },
      { name: "OpenAI: GPT-OSS 120B", tags: ["intelligence", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: false, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "" },
      { name: "OpenAI: GPT-OSS 20B", tags: ["intelligence"], capabilities: { thinking: true, roleplay: false, intelligence: true, skills: false, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "" },
      { name: "MoonshotAI: Kimi K2", tags: ["roleplay", "intelligence", "human-like"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: false, human_like: true, image: false }, description: "This model is very creative, it is great for roleplay or chatting with you just like your best friend!" },
      { name: "Nous: Hermes 4 70B", tags: ["roleplay"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: false, skills: false, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "" },
      { name: "Qwen: Qwen 3 235B", tags: ["intelligence", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: false, intelligence: true, skills: true, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Large-scale model, long dialogue." },
      { name: "Meituan: Longcat Flash Chat", tags: ["roleplay", "human-like", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: false, skills: true, human_like: true, image: false }, description: "Non-thinking foundation model optimized for conversational tasks." },
      { name: "Gemma 2 27b", tags: ["human-like", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: false, intelligence: false, skills: true, human_like: true, image: false }, description: "With a mind of its own both gemma models are super fun to be friends with." },
      { name: "Gemma 2 9b (Turbo)", tags: ["human-like"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: false, intelligence: false, skills: false, human_like: true, image: false }, description: "9b is faster and much more goofy! It's sense of humor is great." },
      { name: "OpenAI: Gpt-4.1 Nano", tags: ["intelligence"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: false, intelligence: true, skills: false, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Perfect fallback engine choice for the latest GPT 4.1 model." },
      { name: "Llama 4 Scout", tags: ["roleplay", "human-like", "skills"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: false, skills: true, human_like: true, image: false }, description: "On par with the previously mentioned LLama models but is more up to date & great with skills." },
      { name: "OpenAI: GPT-4o-mini", tags: ["roleplay", "intelligence", "human-like"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: true, skills: false, human_like: true, image: false }, description: "4o Mini is another insanely fast GPT option that would do great as a fallback engine for other models if they go offline!" },
      { name: "Phi 4 Reasoning Plus", tags: ["intelligence"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: false, intelligence: true, skills: false, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "" },
      { name: "Mistral: Mistral Small 3.1 24B 3/27/25", tags: ["human-like"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: false, intelligence: false, skills: false, human_like: true, image: false }, description: "Rarely used." },
      { name: "Llama 3.3 70B", tags: ["roleplay"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: false, skills: false, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Formerly known as llama 3 instruct model. Good at retrieving knowledge, being in character, human-like behavior." },
      { name: "Deepseek-R1 Llama 3.3 70b Distill", tags: ["roleplay"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: false, skills: false, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Good for general RP even though tends to mischaracterize." },
      { name: "Deepseek-R1 Qwen 32b Distill", tags: ["roleplay"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: false, skills: false, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Very good for complex tasks, good for multi-step reasoning, okay for general RP." },
      { name: "WizardLM 2 8x22b", tags: ["roleplay"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: false, skills: false, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Like lunaris Wizard thinks every roleplay is a wild ride." },
      { name: "Mistral NeMo", tags: ["roleplay", "human-like"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: false, skills: false, human_like: true, image: false }, description: "Short creative role-player and great chatter." },
      { name: "MythoMax 13b", tags: ["roleplay"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: false, skills: false, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Rarely used." },
      { name: "AionLabs: Aion-RP 1.0 (8B)", tags: ["roleplay"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: false, skills: false, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Rarely used." },
      { name: "Mistral: Ministral 8B", tags: ["human-like"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: false, intelligence: false, skills: false, human_like: true, image: false }, description: "Rarely used." },
      { name: "Nous: Hermes 3 70B", tags: ["human-like"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: false, intelligence: false, skills: false, human_like: true, image: false }, description: "Many members love this model for its unique word choices." },
      { name: "Qwen: QwQ 32B 3/25", tags: ["intelligence"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: false, intelligence: true, skills: false, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Rarely used but highly intelligent, known for being great at maths while being adorable!" },
      { name: "Lunaris L3 8B", tags: ["roleplay"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: false, skills: false, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Rarely refusing even the craziest roleplay scenes, lunaris is small but top tier in fast, insane, short roleplay adventures." },
      { name: "sao10k l3.3-euryale-70b", tags: ["roleplay"], capabilities: { thinking: false, roleplay: true, intelligence: false, skills: false, human_like: false, image: false }, description: "Rarely used." }
    ]
  };

  // Capabilities for filtering
  const capabilities = [
    { key: "thinking", label: "Thinking", icon: "🧠" },
    { key: "roleplay", label: "Roleplay", icon: "🎭" },
    { key: "intelligence", label: "Intelligence", icon: "📚" },
    { key: "skills", label: "Skills", icon: "🛠️" },
    { key: "human_like", label: "Human-Like", icon: "👤" },
    { key: "image", label: "Images", icon: "🖼️" }
  ];

  // State
  let activeFilters = [];
  let showPremium = true;
  let showFree = true;

  // Render filter buttons
  function renderButtons() {
    const buttonsContainer = document.getElementById('capability-buttons');
    buttonsContainer.innerHTML = '';
    capabilities.forEach(cap => {
      const button = document.createElement('button');
      button.innerHTML = `${cap.icon} ${cap.label}`;
      button.style.padding = '8px 16px';
      button.style.borderRadius = '8px';
      button.style.fontSize = '14px';
      button.style.fontWeight = '500';
      button.style.background = activeFilters.includes(cap.key) ? '#2563EB' : '#f3f4f6';
      button.style.color = activeFilters.includes(cap.key) ? '#fff' : '#374151';
      button.style.cursor = 'pointer';
      button.style.transition = 'all 0.2s';
      button.setAttribute('aria-label', `Toggle ${cap.label} filter`);
      button.addEventListener('click', () => {
        activeFilters = activeFilters.includes(cap.key) ? activeFilters.filter(f => f !== cap.key) : [...activeFilters, cap.key];
        updateResults();
      });
      buttonsContainer.appendChild(button);
    });
  }

  // Filter engines
  function filterEngines(engines) {
    if (activeFilters.length === 0) return engines;
    return engines.filter(engine => activeFilters.every(filter => engine.capabilities[filter]));
  }

  // Render engine card
  function renderEngineCard(engine, tier) {
    const card = document.createElement('div');
    card.style.padding = '20px';
    card.style.border = '1px solid #e5e7eb';
    card.style.borderRadius = '8px';
    card.style.background = '#fff';
    card.style.marginBottom = '16px';

    const title = document.createElement('h4');
    title.innerText = engine.name;
    title.style.fontSize = '18px';
    title.style.fontWeight = '600';
    title.style.marginBottom = '8px';
    title.style.color = '#111827';

    const badge = tier === 'premium' ? document.createElement('span') : null;
    if (badge) {
      badge.innerText = 'Premium';
      badge.style.fontSize = '12px';
      badge.style.background = '#fef9c3';
      badge.style.color = '#854d0e';
      badge.style.padding = '4px 8px';
      badge.style.borderRadius = '9999px';
      badge.style.marginLeft = '8px';
    }

    const titleContainer = document.createElement('div');
    titleContainer.style.display = 'flex';
    titleContainer.style.alignItems = 'center';
    titleContainer.appendChild(title);
    if (badge) titleContainer.appendChild(badge);

    const description = document.createElement('p');
    description.innerText = engine.description || 'No description available.';
    description.style.fontSize = '14px';
    description.style.color = '#6b7280';
    description.style.marginBottom = '12px';

    const tags = document.createElement('div');
    tags.style.display = 'flex';
    tags.style.flexWrap = 'wrap';
    tags.style.gap = '8px';
    Object.keys(engine.capabilities).forEach(key => {
      if (engine.capabilities[key]) {
        const tag = document.createElement('span');
        const cap = capabilities.find(c => c.key === key);
        tag.innerText = `${cap.icon} ${cap.label}`;
        tag.style.fontSize = '12px';
        tag.style.background = '#eff6ff';
        tag.style.color = '#1D4ED8';
        tag.style.padding = '4px 8px';
        tag.style.borderRadius = '9999px';
        tags.appendChild(tag);
      }
    });

    card.appendChild(titleContainer);
    card.appendChild(description);
    card.appendChild(tags);
    return card;
  }

  // Update results
  function updateResults() {
    const filteredPremium = showPremium ? filterEngines(enginesData.premium) : [];
    const filteredFree = showFree ? filterEngines(enginesData.free) : [];
    const totalResults = filteredPremium.length + filteredFree.length;

    const clearSection = document.getElementById('clear-filters');
    clearSection.style.display = activeFilters.length > 0 ? 'block' : 'none';
    document.getElementById('result-count').innerText = `(${totalResults} ${totalResults === 1 ? 'result' : 'results'})`;

    const resultsContainer = document.getElementById('results');
    resultsContainer.innerHTML = '';

    if (showPremium && filteredPremium.length > 0) {
      const premiumSection = document.createElement('div');
      const premiumTitle = document.createElement('h2');
      premiumTitle.innerText = `Premium (${filteredPremium.length})`;
      premiumTitle.style.fontSize = '24px';
      premiumTitle.style.fontWeight = '700';
      premiumTitle.style.marginBottom = '16px';
      premiumTitle.style.color = '#111827';
      premiumSection.appendChild(premiumTitle);

      const premiumGrid = document.createElement('div');
      premiumGrid.style.display = 'grid';
      premiumGrid.style.gap = '16px';
      premiumGrid.style.marginBottom = '24px';
      if (window.innerWidth >= 768) premiumGrid.style.gridTemplateColumns = 'repeat(2, 1fr)';
      filteredPremium.forEach(engine => premiumGrid.appendChild(renderEngineCard(engine, 'premium')));
      premiumSection.appendChild(premiumGrid);
      resultsContainer.appendChild(premiumSection);
    }

    if (showFree && filteredFree.length > 0) {
      const freeSection = document.createElement('div');
      const freeTitle = document.createElement('h2');
      freeTitle.innerText = `Free (${filteredFree.length})`;
      freeTitle.style.fontSize = '24px';
      freeTitle.style.fontWeight = '700';
      freeTitle.style.marginBottom = '16px';
      freeTitle.style.color = '#111827';
      freeSection.appendChild(freeTitle);

      const freeGrid = document.createElement('div');
      freeGrid.style.display = 'grid';
      freeGrid.style.gap = '16px';
      if (window.innerWidth >= 768) freeGrid.style.gridTemplateColumns = 'repeat(2, 1fr)';
      filteredFree.forEach(engine => freeGrid.appendChild(renderEngineCard(engine, 'free')));
      freeSection.appendChild(freeGrid);
      resultsContainer.appendChild(freeSection);
    }

    if (totalResults === 0) {
      const noResults = document.createElement('div');
      noResults.style.textAlign = 'center';
      noResults.style.padding = '48px 0';
      const message = document.createElement('p');
      message.innerText = 'No engines match your selected filters.';
      message.style.fontSize = '18px';
      message.style.color = '#6b7280';
      const clearButton = document.createElement('button');
      clearButton.innerText = 'Clear filters to see all engines';
      clearButton.style.fontSize = '14px';
      clearButton.style.color = '#3B82F6';
      clearButton.style.textDecoration = 'underline';
      clearButton.style.cursor = 'pointer';
      clearButton.style.background = 'none';
      clearButton.style.border = 'none';
      clearButton.style.marginTop = '12px';
      clearButton.addEventListener('click', () => {
        activeFilters = [];
        updateResults();
      });
      noResults.appendChild(message);
      noResults.appendChild(clearButton);
      resultsContainer.appendChild(noResults);
    }

    renderButtons();
  }

  // Initialize
  document.getElementById('show-premium').addEventListener('change', (e) => {
    showPremium = e.target.checked;
    updateResults();
  });
  document.getElementById('show-free').addEventListener('change', (e) => {
    showFree = e.target.checked;
    updateResults();
  });
  document.getElementById('clear-filters').querySelector('button').addEventListener('click', () => {
    activeFilters = [];
    updateResults();
  });
  renderButtons();
  updateResults();
</script>

## Key
- 🧠 **Thinking**: Supports advanced reasoning or slower, deeper processing.
- 🎭 **Roleplay**: Great for creative, character-driven interactions.
- 📚 **Intelligence**: High knowledge retrieval and factual accuracy.
- 🛠️ **Skills**: Enabled for tool use or specialized tasks (e.g., coding, math).
- 👤 **Human-Like**: Conversational, friendly, or mimics human behavior.
- 🖼️ **Images**: Supports image processing or multimodal tasks.
